description: Training data exfiltration — unauthorized S3 access to customer model training datasets via compromised IAM role
notes: 12 customer training datasets accessed. No model weights exfiltrated.

description: GPU cluster node compromise — cryptocurrency miner detected on inference worker gpu-inf-22
notes: Miner consumed 40% GPU capacity. Inference latency increased. Entry via unpatched container runtime CVE.

description: Anomalous model checkpoint downloads from internal researcher — 47 model checkpoints downloaded in 2 hours
notes: Researcher was downloading checkpoints for legitimate paper comparison. Authorized after manager confirmation.

description: Prompt injection attack on customer-facing inference API — attacker extracted system prompts for 3 customer deployments
notes: System prompts contained customer business logic. Classified as data breach per customer agreements.

description: Suspected model poisoning — anomalous training metrics detected on customer FinServ-Alpha model during scheduled retraining
notes: Investigation revealed training data pipeline corruption — not malicious. Data validation gap allowed corrupted records into training set.

description: Developer pushed API key to public GitHub repository — key scoped to staging environment only
notes: Key revoked. Secret scanning alert from GitHub. Staging-only — no production impact.

description: Unauthorized access to model registry — former employee's Okta session token not revoked during offboarding
notes: Employee terminated December 5. Okta deprovisioned December 5 but existing session tokens remained valid for 7 days per Okta session policy.

description: DDoS attack on inference API — 2.3M requests/second from botnet. Mitigated by Cloudflare auto-scaling rules.
notes: Cloudflare mitigated automatically. No customer impact. Reviewed during business hours.
